title: Origins: Rainbow GUI
description: A texturepack changing the look of the Origin mod's choosing screen and famous Orb of Origins to a rainbow theme
body:
![A pastel cyan banner with a rainbow orb of origin in the center](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a89e8f8030dcbf01fb852af47cc3ac7dcf47f813.png)

**A little texturepack I whipped up for the origins mod's choosing screen. It's also compatible with the Alt Origins GUI mod and was made to hopefully work for every currently available version of Origins!**


![A colorful rendition of the original origins info screen, with brighter colors, rainbow borders, and the Avian origin currently on-screen.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/241a01dd10813012aba4939cb86027cd5cc80bae.png)

The Alternate Origins GUI Version:

![A colorful rendition of the Alt Origins GUI mod's expanded origin choice screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f56c563fb5fa2228eecfd70d04cda79b2010b77.png)
